zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Bardolf於1178年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德時，她的父親Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell37歲，母親Rose de Hanselyn33歲。她於大約1199年與Robert De Remigius在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。她去世在英國艾可布拉德維爾--希亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Bardolf于1178年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德时，她的父亲Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell37岁，母亲Rose de Hanselyn33岁。她于大约1199年与Robert De Remigius在英国英格兰艾可结婚。她去世在英国艾可布拉德維爾--希亞。

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Bardolf was born in 1178, in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, was 37 and her mother, Rose de Hanselyn, was 33. She married Robert De Remigius about 1199, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. She died in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Bardolf est née en 1178, à Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Rose de Hanselyn, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert De Remigius environ 1199, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée à Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Bardolf 1178 in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell 37 und ihre Mutter Rose de Hanselyn 33. Sie hat um 1199 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Robert De Remigius geheiratet. Sie starb in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Bardolf è nata il nel 1178 nel Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Rose de Hanselyn, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Robert De Remigius circa 1199, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Bardolfが1178年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアシェルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewellは37歳，母Rose de Hanselynは33歳であった。約1199年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでRobert De Remigiusと結婚した。彼女はイギリスエセックスブラドウエル-オン-セアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Bardolf(이)가 1178년 영국 노틴그함실르 셸퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose de Hanselyn(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Robert De Remigius(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 영국 에세스 브라드웰--시에서 사망했다.

mn.Wilden, Bedfordshire,England: Wilden, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Bardolf nasceu em 1178, em Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Rose de Hanselyn, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert De Remigius aproximadamente 1199, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Bardolf родилась в 1178 г. в местности шелфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Rose de Hanselyn, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert De Remigius около 1199 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в местности брадвелл-он-сеа, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Bardolf nació en 1178, en Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Rose de Hanselyn, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Robert De Remigius aproximadamente 1199, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Inglaterra.
